{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/chalk/white.png
|block_health=12
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Chalk is a stone that comes in 20 colors.

== Obtaining ==
Chalk is only found in rare biomes, with the modern art biome being the most reliable way to get all the colors.

== Usage ==
Chalk has a slightly different palette compared to other colored blocks, it is less saturated, and the hues are different.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Colored Blocks]]
[[Category:Stone]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
